title: lycopodium crucis-australis
intro: Lycopodium crucis-australis, also known as Stag's Horn Fern or Lycopodium, is a type of evergreen, perennial fern that belongs to the Lycopodiaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lycopodium include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Lycopodium is typically prepared as an herbal tincture, tea, or salve, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
